hero.description: piplos.media builds web applications, mobile apps and backend systems for startups and enterprises. Clean code. Real delivery.

items.title: Web Applications
items.description: SPAs, dashboards, admin panels and enterprise platforms. React, Svelte, Vue and Next.js with TypeScript — from Figma prototypes to production UI.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Cross-platform apps with Flutter and native iOS with Swift. Performance-first UX, offline-ready flows and full App Store deployment.

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.description: Microservices, REST and GraphQL APIs, real-time systems and integrations. Node.js, Go, Python, Java and Rust — built to scale from day one.

items.title: Data & Analytics
items.description: Database design, query optimization, caching layers and analytics pipelines. OLTP and OLAP workloads with PostgreSQL, ClickHouse and Redis.

items.title: DevOps & Cloud
items.description: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, cloud infrastructure and monitoring. Docker, Kubernetes, AWS and Terraform with GitHub Actions.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We dig into your goals, constraints and technical requirements before writing a single line of code.

steps.title: Architecture
steps.description: System design, tech stack selection, and a clear roadmap agreed upon before development starts.

steps.title: Build & Iterate
steps.description: Agile sprints with weekly demos. You see progress, give feedback, and stay in control throughout.

steps.title: Ship & Support
steps.description: Deployment, monitoring setup, and ongoing support. We stay with you after launch.

cta.title: Ready to build something great?
cta.description: Tell us about your project. We'll get back within 24 hours with a plan and an estimate.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.cta_sub: Tell us about your idea — we'll get back within 24 hours with a plan and estimate.
portfolio.description: 240+ projects delivered across web, mobile, SaaS, fintech and enterprise software.

description.label: Description
description.hint: What problem does it solve? Who are the users? What's the core functionality?

stack.label: Preferred Tech Stack
stack.hint: Leave blank — we'll recommend the best stack.

notes.label: Anything else?
notes.placeholder: NDA required, specific constraints, preferred communication channel...

order.success_text: We've received your project brief. Our team will review it and get back to you within 24 hours with a plan and initial estimate.

promises.title: 24h response
promises.text: — we review every brief personally and reply within one business day.

promises.title: Free estimate
promises.text: — detailed scope, timeline and cost breakdown at no charge.

promises.title: No lock-in
promises.text: — you own all code, repos and infrastructure from day one.

promises.title: Fixed-price or T&M
promises.text: — we adapt to your preferred engagement model.

promises.title: NDA on request
promises.text: — confidentiality agreement available before any discussion.

order.testimonial_text: "piplos.media delivered our analytics platform on time and under budget. Their code quality and communication are exceptional — we've been working together for 3 years."
